import { Grid, Paper } from '@material-ui/core' import React, { useState } from 'react' export default function StudentDashboard() { const [blogs, setBlogs] = useState([ { title: 'My new website', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'mario', id: 1 }, { title: 'Welcome party!', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'yoshi', id: 2 }, { title: 'Web dev top tips', body: 'lorem ipsum...', author: 'mario', id: 3 } ]) return (
1 2 3 4
) }
